entry_exit.entry: If Google Trends search interest for tech earnings reports rises 20% above the prior 4-week average
entry_exit.exit: After 2 weeks or when search interest falls below 10% above the prior 4-week average

trigger.condition: Google Trends search interest for tech earnings reports rises 20% above the prior 4-week average

google_trends.metric: weekly search interest for tech company earnings reports
